# Apache HTTPD (HTTP) — custom-to-root-context

Proxy at /app/, app at root /. The public URL adds an /app prefix that the proxy strips before forwarding to the backend root.

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

Apache HTTPD config (`vaadin.conf`):

```apache
<Location /app/>
    ProxyPass         "http://vaadin:8080/" upgrade=websocket
    ProxyPassReverse  "http://vaadin:8080/"
    ProxyPassReverseCookiePath "/" "/app"
</Location>
```
